table-on.eng: Place the mug on the table.
table-on.deu: Stell die Tasse auf den Tisch.
table-on.tha: วางแก้วบนโต๊ะ
table-on.fra: Mets la tasse sur la table.

chair-on.eng: Place the mug on the chair.
chair-on.deu: Stell die Tasse auf den Stuhl.
chair-on.tha: วางแก้วบนเก้าอี้
chair-on.fra: Pose la tasse sur la chaise.

table-next-to.eng: Place the mug next to the table.
table-next-to.deu: Stell die Tasse neben den Tisch.
table-next-to.ita: Metti la tazza accanto al tavolo.
table-next-to.vie: Đặt cái cốc bên cạnh bàn.
table-next-to.tha: วางแก้วข้างโต๊ะ
table-next-to.fra: Mets la tasse à côté de la table.

chair-next-to.eng: Place the mug next to the chair.
chair-next-to.deu: Stell die Tasse neben den Stuhl.
chair-next-to.ita: Metti la tazza accanto alla sedia.
chair-next-to.vie: Đặt cái cốc bên cạnh ghế.
chair-next-to.tha: วางแก้วข้างเก้าอี้
chair-next-to.fra: Mets la tasse à côté de la chaise.

table-chair-between.eng: Place the mug between the table and the chair.
table-chair-between.deu: Stell die Tasse zwischen den Tisch und den Stuhl.
table-chair-between.ita: Metti la tazza tra il tavolo e la sedia.
table-chair-between.vie: Đặt cái cốc giữa bàn và ghế.
table-chair-between.tha: วางแก้วระหว่างโต๊ะกับเก้าอี้
table-chair-between.fra: Mets la tasse entre la table et la chaise.

table-right-of.eng: Place the mug to the right of the table.
table-right-of.deu: Stell die Tasse rechts vom Tisch.
table-right-of.ita: Metti la tazza a destra del tavolo.
table-right-of.vie: Đặt cái cốc bên phải bàn.
table-right-of.tha: วางแก้วไว้ขวามือของโต๊ะ
table-right-of.fra: Mets la tasse à droite de la table.

chair-left-of.eng: Place the mug to the left of the chair.
chair-left-of.deu: Stell die Tasse links von dem Stuhl.
chair-left-of.ita: Metti la tazza a sinistra della sedia.
chair-left-of.vie: Đặt cái cốc bên trái ghế.
chair-left-of.tha: วางแก้วไว้ทางซ้ายของเก้าอี้
chair-left-of.fra: Mets la tasse à gauche de la chaise.

table-left-of.eng: Place the mug to the left of the table.
table-left-of.deu: Stell die Tasse links vom Tisch.
table-left-of.ita: Metti la tazza a sinistra del tavolo.
table-left-of.vie: Đặt cái cốc bên trái bàn.
table-left-of.tha: วางแก้วไว้ทางซ้ายของโต๊ะ
table-left-of.fra: Mets la tasse à gauche de la table.

table-below.eng: Place the mug under the table.
table-below.deu: Stell die Tasse unter den Tisch.
table-below.ita: Metti la tazza sotto il tavolo.
table-below.tha: วางแก้วใต้โต๊ะ
table-below.fra: Mets la tasse sous la table.

chair-below.eng: Place the mug under the chair.
chair-below.deu: Stell die Tasse unter den Stuhl.
chair-below.ita: Metti la tazza sotto la sedia.
chair-below.tha: วางแก้วไว้ใต้เก้าอี้
chair-below.fra: Mets la tasse sous la chaise.

chair-right-of.eng: Place the mug to the right of the chair.
chair-right-of.deu: Stell die Tasse rechts neben den Stuhl.
chair-right-of.ita: Metti la tazza a destra della sedia.
chair-right-of.vie: Đặt cái cốc bên phải ghế.
chair-right-of.tha: วางแก้วไว้ข้างขวาของเก้าอี้
chair-right-of.fra: Mets la tasse à droite de la chaise.

chair-in-front-of.eng: Place the mug in front of the chair.
chair-in-front-of.deu: Stell die Tasse vor den Stuhl.
chair-in-front-of.ita: Metti la tazza davanti alla sedia.
chair-in-front-of.tha: วางแก้วไว้ข้างหน้าของเก้าอี้
chair-in-front-of.fra: Mets la tasse devant la chaise.

chair-behind.eng: Place the mug behind the chair.
chair-behind.deu: Stell die Tasse hinter den Stuhl.
chair-behind.ita: Metti la tazza dietro la sedia.
chair-behind.vie: Đặt cái cốc ở phía sau ghế.
chair-behind.tha: วางแก้วไว้หลังเก้าอี้
chair-behind.fra: Mets la tasse derrière la chaise.

table-in-front-of.eng: Place the mug in front of the table.
table-in-front-of.deu: Stell die Tasse vor den Tisch.
table-in-front-of.ita: Metti la tazza davanti al tavolo.
table-in-front-of.tha: วางแก้วไว้ข้างหน้าตาราง
table-in-front-of.fra: Mets la tasse devant la table.

table-behind.eng: Place the mug behind the table.
table-behind.deu: Stell die Tasse hinter den Tisch.
table-behind.ita: Metti la tazza dietro il tavolo.
table-behind.vie: Đặt cái cốc ở phía sau bàn.
table-behind.tha: วางแก้วไว้หลังโต๊ะ
table-behind.fra: Mets la tasse derrière la table.
